description: Mack and Piper perform emergency surgery on Deke at the Lighthouse. The two face high stress as they clamp a damaged artery and keep Deke stable, showing personal anxieties and giving viewers an emotional glimpse into the fallout from recent events.

transcript.line: Almost cleaned out. Okay. Where do we go from here?
I think he has a hemothorax, blood in his chest cavity. We need to stop the bleeding and drain it.
You'll need to cut into the wound so we can see what we're doing.
Well, he's already unconscious, and I haven't read that chapter yet, so we'll just figure it out as we go.
So, this kid's from the future?
Yeah. And in that future, Earth is gone, and the last of humanity is enslaved by alien overlords.
Alien over... I should've stayed in my cell. You're telling me that we got our asses handed to us by little green men.
They were big and blue. But they didn't crack the world apart. They said it was Daisy.
And you're still sending her on missions?
I need her leading missions. I got an old injury acting up. Not sure what my timetable is, exactly.
Oh, for the love of flapjacks. Do you ever have any good news?
There's a young Inhuman who's seen a better future. We're working toward that.
Anything else we can do for him?
We're here if they need a hand.
